summary: Comprehensive testing completed for UK Water Safety Map enhanced features. All new functionality working perfectly including bathing waters section, historical data charts, share reports with social media integration, notification subscriptions, and mobile responsive design.
passed_tests: Bathing Waters API returning beach locations with quality classifications (Excellent/Good/Sufficient/Poor)
Historical Data API providing 7-day water level history with min/max/avg/trend statistics
Share Report API generating shareable text with emojis and hashtags for social media
Notification subscription endpoints properly requiring authentication
Bathing Waters section displaying in sidebar with 3 beach names and quality ratings
Detail panel with Info and History tabs functioning correctly
History tab showing interactive water level chart using recharts library
Share button opening share dialog with Twitter and Facebook options
Copy share text functionality working with user feedback
Mobile responsive layout adapting sidebar and detail panel positioning
Mobile menu button and sidebar toggle functionality working
Station markers on map with custom icons based on safety scores and beach type
AI safety insights generation with Emergent LLM integration
Environment Agency API integration for real-time data
Authentication flow ready for Google OAuth
All backend API endpoints returning correct response structures
Cross-browser compatibility and responsive design implementation
